word: H5956 - עָלַם - ʻâlam - aw-lam' - [idiom] any ways

sections.paragraph:
Original: עלם

Transliteration: ‛âlam

Phonetic: aw-lam'

BDB Definition:

  1. to conceal, hide, be hidden, be concealed, be secret
    1. (Qal) secret (participle)
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to be concealed
      2. concealed, dissembler (participle)
    3. (Hiphil) to conceal, hide
    4. (Hithpael) to hide oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1629

Part(s) of speech: Verb
